title: Parkside Commons and Item 52 Held — Financial Questions
summary: Rita Paniagua announces items 51 (Parkside Commons Phase 1 tax exemption) and 52 are both held pending financial questions from Councilors Williams and Paniagua. Meeting adjourns immediately after.
raw_content:
[00:30:50] items 51 and 52. Uh item 51 will be
[00:30:53] held. We have some financial questions,
[00:30:56] Councelor Williams and I. and 52 will
[00:30:59] also be held.
[00:31:01] >> Are they both being held then?
[00:31:02] >> Yes, both held.
[00:31:03] >> Okay.
[00:31:05] And with that, we came to the uh close
[00:31:08] of the agenda. Motion to motion to
[00:31:11] adjurnn.
[00:31:12] So move second. Second.
[00:31:15] >> Okay. Thank you.

political_signal.description: Financial questions from council leadership holding housing development tax exemption item for further review

processing_notes: Item 52 description truncated in agenda; held alongside Parkside Commons
